findings.description: The JSON example in s1 is missing two plugin entries and one libraryDeployMappings entry compared to the source example, with no indication that it is a simplified excerpt.
findings.source_evidence: Source plugins array includes `{ "pattern": "requirejs-text" }` and `{ "pattern": "less" }` which are absent from the knowledge file example. Source libraryDeployMappings includes `"sugar": { "release/sugar-full.development.js": "js/sugar.js" }` which is also absent from the knowledge file example.
